# VexFlow repository lineage

Source: https://github.com/vexflow/vexflow/blob/main/VEXFLOW.md

The official `vexflow/vexflow` repository contains VexFlow version 5+. The previous version line, VexFlow 4.x and earlier, remains in the historical `0xfe/vexflow` repository. The project was converted to TypeScript, gained ES module support, and moved to the VexFlow organization repository.
